name: core-antigravity
description: Google Antigravity port of the core baseline. Ships the judge-hook (PreToolUse rules engine, deny/allow JSON, escalates via gemini), the writing-guard (pre-write AI-tells guard on the write tools), the research-nudge (Stop hook to verify hedged factual claims), and the core guidelines for ~/.gemini/AGENTS.md. /core-antigravity:setup seeds ~/.gemini/judge-rules.json and writes the guidelines block.
